notes: Single source of truth for V1 monolithic preset key migration buckets. Read by `_rollout.py` + `audit_v1_migration.py`. Tombstone bucket initially empty; populated per-incident via `sndr_private/planning/incidents/`.

a5000-2x-27b-int4-tq-k8v4.rationale: Direct match — V2 preset composes identical config (TQ k8v4 + MTP K=3 single-stream).

a5000-2x-35b-prod.rationale: Direct match — V2 preset composes identical config (FP8 + TQ k8v4 + MTP K=3 balanced).

a5000-2x-27b-dflash-true.rationale: Direct match — V2 preset composes identical config (DFlash N=5 single-stream).

a5000-2x-27b-int4-tq-k8v4-dflash.rationale: A/B diagnostic config — V2 equivalent is the experimental-tier `experimental-27b-tq-dflash-ab` preset (uses `ab-27b-tq-dflash` profile, same TQ k8v4 model + same 5 DFlash envs PN21/PN23/PN24/PN38/PN40 + same 131K ctx). V1 carries `lifecycle: retired` in its YAML; documented -23.6% TPS regression on MTP path is preserved in the V2 profile docstring. Diagnostic kept for regression / patch-dispatcher coverage testing; not for production. (Reclassified 2026-05-26 from needs_operator_choice → deprecated after V1-SUNSET-DFLASH-ALIAS.R confirmed V2 equivalent already exists.)

a5000-2x-27b-int4-long-ctx.rationale: V2 alias exists but card-less + bench_pending; needs long-context evidence refresh before promotion to production.

a5000-2x-35b-fp8-dflash.rationale: V2 alias exists with production_candidate status; operator should verify identical compose before flipping references.

a5000-1x-27b-int4-tested.rationale: qa-tested single-GPU 27B; V2 alias is card-less, awaiting CONFIG-UX.2b annotation.

a5000-2x-27b-int4-tested.rationale: qa-tested rather than prod-tested; V2 alias is card-less, awaiting CONFIG-UX.2b annotation.

a5000-1x-tier-aware-pn95.rationale: PN95 tier-aware was experimental; closest V2 alias is the single-3090 example preset (different hardware but same concept).

a5000-2x-tier-aware-example.rationale: `-example` suffix marks non-prod; direct V2 migration to the example namespace.

single-3090-dense-cpu-offload-example.rationale: Direct V2 migration; example namespace, single-3090 hardware.

single-3090-hybrid-gdn-tier-aware-exampl.rationale: Direct V2 migration; example namespace, single-3090 hardware.
